features.description: A fresh agent can start, understand state, choose one unblocked feature, and leave a clean handoff without prior conversation context.
acceptance_steps: Read agent instructions, progress, feature ledger, and recent git history.
Run the canonical initialization and smoke path.
Create a valid current contract for one feature.
Complete a dry-run evaluator and progress handoff.
verification_evidence: Independent Level 1 evaluation recorded in agent-state/evaluation.json.
Git Bash and PowerShell initialization and smoke scripts passed.
Scripts resolve repository root from their own paths, validate required files and JSON, and report app scaffold checks as pending F002.
Negative missing-file and invalid-JSON checks used temporary copied fixtures and produced actionable failures.
No application scaffolding or product implementation was added.

features.description: A clean checkout has complete licensing, tooling, CI, security checks, and a reproducible monorepo baseline.
acceptance_steps: Verify approved licence and notice files.
Run formatting, linting, tests, secret and dependency checks.
Verify CI rejects a controlled failure and passes after removal.
verification_evidence: Independent Level 1 evaluation recorded in agent-state/evaluation.json for commit b7f51436a6dfd88b8e3e4b46faad4e9b68374101.
Required AGPL-3.0 licence and notice files exist, are non-empty, and match docs/LICENSING.md.
scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit passed all checks: Ruff lint/format, pytest (20 passed), Prettier, ESLint, detect-secrets, pip-audit, and npm audit.
Individual ruff, pytest, Prettier, and ESLint commands passed independently.
Controlled unused-import probe failed with F401, was removed, and tests\ ruff check passed afterward.
Secret baseline findings are false positives (git commit SHA and environment-variable names) and use forward-slash paths.
CI is read-only, uses no secrets, and covers Python, Node, secret scan, and dependency audit jobs.
scripts/check.ps1 resolved the repository root and passed when invoked by absolute path from C:\.
.venv and node_modules are ignored and untracked; no application scaffolding was added.

features.description: The frontend, API, worker, scheduler, and PostgreSQL start through the canonical scripts and remain healthy after restart.
acceptance_steps: Start the full stack through the canonical script.
Verify frontend, API, worker, scheduler, migrations, and database connectivity.
Restart and rerun the smoke workflow.
Stop and clean up through documented commands.
verification_evidence: Fresh-context independent full-epic Level 2 evaluation of the merged main branch (commit 9f43e07) recorded disposition=passed with 0 blocking failures across all 11 criteria in agent-state/evaluation.json (increment full-epic-close-out).

Canonical stack-up brought all five services healthy (postgres, api, worker, scheduler, web) and scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 passed all 11 checks: API liveness/readiness, app_meta + worker (job_queue/service_heartbeat) migrations, worker/scheduler healthy, queue processed >=1 job to done, fresh heartbeats, web healthy, web serves the SPA (GET / 200 with #root), and web proxies GET /api/health (200 status=ok).
Restart resilience confirmed: stack-down (keep volumes) -> stack-up -> stack-smoke passed all 11 checks again; clean stop via scripts/stack-down.ps1 left no running services.

Negative seam proof (real integration, not mocked): with the api service stopped, GET / stayed 200 while GET /api/health returned 504 through the nginx proxy, then recovered to 200 after api restarted.

Regression green on main: scripts/test.ps1 (42 Python passed + 4 web tests + web build) and scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit (ruff, format, pytest, prettier, eslint, secret scan, pip-audit, npm audit = 0 vulnerabilities) both passed.
Delivered across three merged slices: PR #5 (6049e7f, API + PostgreSQL + Alembic), PR #6 (bd41c98, worker + scheduler PostgreSQL job queue), PR #7 (9f43e07, React web frontend served by nginx).

features.description: Typed configuration, the catalogue model, immutable evidence history, and explainable Z0 classification enforce all safety rules.
acceptance_steps: Validate good and bad YAML with actionable errors.
Apply, rollback, and reapply database migrations.
Verify immutable offer versions and evidence provenance.
Run the Z0 truth table including unknown and contradictory conditions.
verification_evidence: Fresh-context independent full-epic Level 2 evaluation of merged main (commit e23212997763bf4e3a2bd9f72e53d475dfc2ec36, covering config PR #9, domain model/migration PR #10, and Z0 engine PR #11) recorded disposition=passed with 0 blocking issues across all four acceptance steps in agent-state/evaluation.json (increment full-epic-close-out).

Step 1 (config): app.config.cli validated all 4 config/examples files (exit 0); independent adversarial bad-YAML probes for syntax error, unknown family, inline secret, schema violation, and empty file each returned exit 1 with actionable file-scoped messages, and a mixed good+bad batch produced per-file OK/FAIL and exit 1.

Step 2 (migrations): against live PostgreSQL, an independent Alembic probe ran upgrade(head) -> downgrade(0002_worker_queue) -> upgrade(head) with domain tables removed then recreated and infra tables untouched; tests/integration/test_domain_migration.py::test_migration_round_trip and test_no_model_migration_drift passed.

Step 3 (immutability + provenance): direct-SQL adversarial probe confirmed UPDATE/DELETE of an existing offer_version is rejected by trg_offer_version_immutable (restrict_violation) while appending a new version succeeds; deleting a Source/Snapshot referenced by Evidence is RESTRICTed and dangling-FK Evidence is rejected; the four related integration tests passed on live Postgres.

Step 4 (Z0 truth table): tests/unit/test_z0_classifier.py 75 passed; an independent adversarial probe over the gate matrix plus a 558-combination invariant grid recorded 0 Z0-on-unknown/contradictory violations, with deterministic contradiction handling (billing dominates) and explainable reasons/blocking_conditions on every result.

Regression green on merged main: scripts/test.ps1 (147 passed/10 skipped + 4 web tests + web build) and scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit (ruff, format, pytest, prettier, eslint, detect-secrets, pip-audit 0, npm audit 0) both exit 0; full live stack cycle stack-up -> stack-smoke (12/12 incl. domain migration + immutability trigger) -> stack-down passed with no running services afterward.
No new runtime dependency (dependency manifest diff vs origin/main empty) and no unsupported free-tier/Z0 product claim introduced.

features.description: Safe official-source adapters produce reproducible candidates, evidence, changes, health, and conflicts without publishing directly.
acceptance_steps: Run contract tests for every source type.
Verify official-domain allowlists, network blocking, limits, timeouts, and malformed-data handling.
Verify unchanged, changed, stale, and contradictory fixtures.
Confirm community sources cannot become verified evidence.
verification_evidence: AC1 (contract tests every source type): Full offline suite scripts/test.ps1 green (335 passed / 28 skipped); check.ps1 -NodeAudit 8/8 gates green; live integration suite on fresh Postgres 28 passed; independent adversarial adapter probes 45/45 — reference/RSS/HTML/structured-API/MCP each produce candidate-only facts across unchanged/changed/malformed/partial/contradictory.

AC2 (allowlists, network blocking, limits, timeouts, malformed): Independent SSRF probes confirm non-allowlisted host, cross-host redirect, private-IP, cloud-metadata (169.254.169.254 incl. IPv4-mapped-IPv6 unmasking), non-https, oversize, timeout, and bad-MIME all refused; adapters reach network only via injected Fetcher (grep: no direct HTTP client import); OfflineFetcher default never opens a socket; deterministic JSON nesting-depth cap (100) enforced by pre-parse raw-text scan independent of recursionlimit; MCP capability allowlist enforced both directions with offline client (spy calls=0 when disallowed). Malformed NEVER crashes and NEVER guesses — proven end-to-end via run_scan (errors=1, 0 candidates, 0 evidence, snapshot persisted, status=partial). Residual R1 (DNS-rebinding IP pinning) is a documented accepted out-of-scope deferral (progress.md S1 + current_contract.json), not a blocker.

AC3 (unchanged/changed/stale/contradictory): Independent reconciliation probes 23/23 — unchanged=no event; material change=DRAFT ChangeEvent; stale=flagged; contradictory across official different-source candidates=pending ReviewItem never auto-resolved; unknown never conflicts; community excluded from contradictions; zero OfferVersion created. run_scan probes 18/18 confirm official source -> hashed Snapshot + pre-publication Candidate + Evidence linked Source/Snapshot/Candidate with offer_version_id NULL; reproducible hashing; idempotent re-scan (0 changes).

AC4 (community cannot become verified evidence): community source -> DiscoveryCandidate quarantine + non-official candidate + 0 evidence. Independent raw-SQL DB probes 10/10 — DB Trigger A (trg_candidate_official_source) rejects official candidate on community source; Trigger B (trg_evidence_official_candidate) rejects evidence referencing a community candidate; in-place promotion rejected; all raise restrict_violation (SQLSTATE 23001); positive official-path control allowed.

Global invariants: NO publication path / NO OfferVersion writes anywhere (grep clean; offer_version_id always NULL); trg_offer_version_immutable independently rejects both UPDATE and DELETE on offer_version (23001); official-only evidence; 'unknown is better than guessed' upheld; stdlib-only — no new runtime/npm dependency (manifest diff vs origin/main empty, requirements-sync gate green); all migrations 0001..0006 reversible — independent full downgrade-to-base -> upgrade-to-head round-trip on live DB: 6 revisions apply, all 3 triggers reinstalled, compare_metadata drift == [].

features.description: Cloudflare works end to end from official discovery through verification, history, review, API, and public provider experience.
acceptance_steps: Run Cloudflare scans and deterministic quota extraction.
Verify repeat scans do not create false changes.
Exercise changed and contradictory evidence paths.
Browse category states, offers, evidence, confidence, history, completeness, and freshness.
verification_evidence: Fresh, independent, adversarial full-epic Level-2 close-out of merged main (HEAD 6f5e1e738168c72edc96cb81cfa668d550f8cd85: S4 6f5e1e7 web + S3 1b7fb34 read-API + S2 d377d0a publish + S1 405264a extraction/config-sync/0007) on a LIVE stack (alt ports POSTGRES_PORT=55432/API_PORT=8010/WEB_PORT=8090, docker compose down --volumes -> up --build, fresh DB migrations 0001..0007). Offline gates green (scripts/test.ps1 exit 0: pytest 425 passed/48 skipped, config incl. cloudflare valid, web Vitest 33/33, Vite build ok; scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit exit 0: all 8 gates - Ruff lint, Ruff format, Pytest, Prettier, ESLint, detect-secrets, pip-audit, npm audit). Live: stack-smoke 15/15; integration suite 48 passed (46 + 2 stack-health with ATLAS_STACK_BASE_URL set), 0 unexpected skips. Dependency-manifest diff across the whole F005 range (dafbd89..6f5e1e7) is EMPTY (no new runtime/npm dependency); requirements-sync gate green. ~100 independent live checks total.

Step 1 (Cloudflare scans + deterministic quota extraction -> gated publish): the runner (python -m app.ingest.runner --publish, fixtures) drove S1 extraction + the S2 publish path on a FRESH DB -> published=2 (Cloudflare Workers + Pages) from official HTML fixtures. Raw-SQL cross-check: 1 provider, 2 services, 2 offers, 2 immutable offer_versions, 17 quotas, official evidence linked to each version (offer_version_id non-null), 2 published 'added' change_events, 0 pending reviews. Deterministic extraction is reproducible (stable content_hash) and each offer is Z0-classified Z0_TRUE_FREE with human-readable reasons; the 3 fixture-absent sources (changelog RSS, pages-pricing, docs-mcp) fail-isolate per-source via SAVEPOINT and are not defects.

Step 2 (repeat scans create no false changes): idempotency proven at BOTH levels on the live stack. Scan-level - the immediate re-run reported changes=0 for both sources and provider/source sync unchanged (created=0/updated=0/unchanged=5). Publish-level - re-publishing identical facts yielded published=0, unchanged=1 per offer, with offer/offer_version/change_event counts unchanged at 2/2/2. content_hash is computed over stable material facts only (offer_type, requires_card, has_paid_dependencies, exhaustion_behaviour, quotas), excluding time-varying confidence/freshness, so identical inputs append NO new OfferVersion.

Step 3 (changed AND contradictory evidence paths): material change - an edited Workers fixture (requests_per_day 100,000->200,000/day) appended a NEW append-only OfferVersion v2 (v1's 100,000 retained immutably) plus a PUBLISHED 'modified' change_event (previous_version_id=2, new_version_id=3, materiality material). Contradiction - an independent live probe (probe_live.py, all rolled back) seeded two official sources contradicting on a material fact (requires_card), reconciled to a PENDING ReviewItem, then publish_candidate returned decision=review, version_created=False, and OfferVersion count was UNCHANGED (ZERO auto-published versions); the pending ReviewItem still stands - never auto-resolved, never published.

Step 4 (browse the public provider experience end-to-end): all read-API endpoints served REAL published data over the nginx /api proxy (WEB_PORT=8090). /catalogue/providers -> Cloudflare completeness 1.0 / freshness 1.0 / 2 published offers; /category-states -> Pages + Workers grouped, both Z0_TRUE_FREE, confidence label 'high', status active; /offers/{id} -> offer_type always_free, zero_cost_class Z0_TRUE_FREE, 4 plain-language Z0 reasons, quotas, and the confidence LABEL primary with the raw numeric score+signals ONLY inside the 'advanced' block (D039); /evidence -> official=true real Cloudflare URL (developers.cloudflare.com/pages/platform/limits/) with content_hash + snapshot provenance linked to offer_version_id; /history -> append-only versions + published 'added' change_events. The S4 web SPA is served (root 200, #root, production bundle 200) with API base const '/api' and 13 /catalogue references, confirming the page renders the live API data end-to-end.

Global invariants (independent live probes, mostly rolled back): OfferVersion immutability - raw-SQL UPDATE and DELETE of a published offer_version BOTH rejected with SQLSTATE 23001 (trg_offer_version_immutable), while appending a new version succeeds. 0006 community/official separation - trg_candidate_official_source rejects an official candidate on a community source (23001) and trg_evidence_official_candidate rejects evidence on a non-official candidate (23001); a positive official-path control is allowed. Community can NEVER publish - a non-official candidate routes to WITHHOLD (version_created=False, offer_id=None, offer count unchanged). No publication bypass - publish is deterministic and official-evidence-only with no LLM/network in the loop; contradiction/uncertainty routes to REVIEW, unofficial/unevidenced to WITHHOLD. Read-API is GET-only - POST/PUT/DELETE -> 405; hostile slugs rejected (UPPER -> 422, url-like SSRF and path-traversal -> 404, unknown -> 404) so 'unknown is better than guessed' and no user-controlled-URL/SSRF surface. Product-truth - the Z0_TRUE_FREE 'truly free' claim is genuinely official-evidence-backed (official Cloudflare evidence URL + snapshot + deterministic reasons), not manufactured. Migration round-trip - an independent alembic downgrade-to-base -> upgrade-to-head dropped then recreated all domain tables with compare_metadata drift == [] and all 3 triggers reinstalled.

features.description: Users can search, compare, inspect evidence, and receive deterministic evidence-backed Z0 architecture recommendations.
acceptance_steps: Test catalogue search, filters, comparison, evidence, and history.
Disable LLM providers and run the adviser evaluation corpus.
Verify quota math, Z0 safety, portability, lock-in, and exit-plan explanations.
Verify impossible workloads follow reduction, recalculation, and self-hosting order.

features.description: Model routing, browser ZIP generation, and private administration operate under consent, safety, validation, and authorization controls.
acceptance_steps: Test model consent, failure, quota exhaustion, and deterministic fallback.
Verify generated ZIPs are validated, secret-free, and not persisted server-side.
Verify only the allowlisted GitHub administrator can use admin functions.
Exercise negative security and audit scenarios.

features.description: GitHub, AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, Vercel, and Oracle are each investigated across all fourteen categories with official evidence and fixtures.
acceptance_steps: Run official-source adapters and fixtures for each provider.
Verify every provider-category pair has an explicit state.
Exercise changed, stale, withdrawn, and contradictory cases.
Verify community repositories remain non-authoritative.

features.description: A documented public Z0 deployment operates at zero cost and version 0.1.0 passes every mandatory MVP criterion.
acceptance_steps: Complete real no-payment onboarding for every public component.
Verify public workflows, quota usage, headroom, estimated bill, and mirror deployment.
Run all functional, data, security, accessibility, portability, and architecture checks.
Tag version 0.1.0 only after independent release approval.
